Chuck Lorre’s Warner Bros. Joke Steals the Big Bang Spinoff Premiere
results.description: Chuck Lorre has taken a lighthearted jab at the recent Paramount-Warner Bros. merger deal. The television producer made the comment at the premiere of The Big Bang Theory’s spinoff on Tuesday. Chuck Lorre pokes fun at Warner Bros. deal drama at Stuart Fails to Save the Universe premiere Award-winning television producer Chuck Lorre took a [...] The post Chuck Lorre’s Warner Bros. Joke Steals the Big Bang Spinoff Premiere appeared first on Mandatory .

results.title: ‘Jana Nayagan’ frenzy reaches feverish pitch across Tamil Nadu
results.description: Frenzied fans and passionate TVK workers thronged cinemas on Thursday morning with excitement and watched the ‘first day first show’ of Chief Minister C Vijay Joseph starrer ‘Jana Nayagan,’ and celebrated the farewell movie in a variety of colourful ways. Cooking of ‘Pongal,’ display of fireworks, music and drone light shows, cutting of huge cakes [...]

results.title: Donal Bisht: Watching myself on a 70mm screen was nostalgic
results.description: Mumbai, July 23 (SocialNews.XYZ) Actress Donal Bisht, who has made a debut into Telugu cinema with “MRP”, says she has worked across television and web, but watching herself on a 70mm screen was nostalgic.
